description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden table with a dark, richly grained rectangular top featuring gently undulating, scalloped edges. The tabletop is supported by four elegantly curved cabriole legs, each painted in a light cream color that contrasts with the darker wood of the top. The apron of the table is adorned with a subtle carved floral motif at the center of the longer sides, adding a decorative touch. The surface of the tabletop shows visible wood grain and some minor distressing, giving it a rustic, antique appearance. The legs are robust and slightly splayed, providing stability and a classic silhouette. This table would be well-suited for use in a café, sidewalk bistro, or as a decorative accent in an urban park or garden setting.
description: A vintage wooden table with a dark, scalloped top and cream-colored, curved legs, featuring a carved floral motif on the apron. The table has a rustic, antique finish and elegant cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved floral motif on the apron and the full curvature of the front legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the scalloped tabletop edge and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but without the central floral motif, showing the back legs and apron.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the scalloped edge and the side profile of the legs.
